raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "22. Tad nehme Samuels Saulu un wiꞥſcha Puuti/ un wed- 
de tehs Ehdamo-Raimbari / un 
felhdinaja tehs wiſſnungstaka 
Weetâ/ pee teem Aizinateem/ to 
bija pee trihsdesmits Wihrnu."
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "23. Tad fazzija Samuels us 
to Pawarru: Dohd schur to Gab- 
balu/ fo es tew dewu/ kad es us 
tew fazziju : Paglabba to fe- 
wischki."
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "24. Tad atneffe tas Patvars 
weenu Plezzu ar to/ kas klaht 
bija/ un zehle to Saulani preek- 
fcha/ un wiꞥſch fazzija : Rangi/ 
tas irr atlizzis / nem to preekſch 
tewis un ehd/ jo tas irr us scho 
pafchu Laiku preekſch tew paglab- 
bahts/ man faktoht/ es etmu ar- 
ridsan (zittus) Saulis aizinajs. 
Ta ehde Saulis ar Samuels tai 
Deena."
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "25. Pehz nogahje tee no ta 
Augſtuina us Pilſfahtu / un 
wiꞥſch runnaja ar Saulu us 
Junitu."
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "26. Un tee zehlehs agri / un 
kad Gaifma mettehs / aizinaja 
Samuels to Saulu us Jumtu/ 
tazzidams: Zellees/ ka es tew at- 
laiffhu. Tad zehlehs Sauls / un 
tee abbee / wiꞥſch un Samuels/ 
tsgahje ahra."
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "27. Un kad tee ithds Pilsf 
ta Gallam nogahje/ fazzija S 
imuels usSaulu: Sakki tainP 
fcham/ laid wiꞥſch mums papre 
schu eet/ tad nogahje tas/ bet 
pastahwi taggad / jo es likfe 
tew Deewa Wahrdn dsirdeht."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta X. Nodalla.
Samuels fwaida Saulu par Kehniau pahr
fraelu : 1. Pastahsta tam arri Siſmes /
us Zeffu tam notiks : 2. Ir tas ta noteef :
Sauls starp Praueefscheem stahsta Pran
scho Mahzibu : 10. Slepjahs starp ta
Traukeem : 22. Tohp no Deewa eeshme
un preekſch wiſſeem par Kehniau isfauk
23/24. Kehnixa Leejas : 25.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "1. Ad nehme Samue
weenu Efjes-Trauzim
un islehje to us wini
Galwu/ un skuhsfija to/ un fa
zia: Neggi tas ta irr / ka ta
KUNGS teivi par Waldita
pahr fawu eemantojamu Tee
fwaidijs ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Kad tu schodeen no manni
no-eeti/ tad atrasti tu diwi Wi
rus pee Raëles Kappa/ pee Be
jamina Rohbeschus eekſch Zetza
tee fazzihis us tew : Tabs Ehset
Mahtes irr atrastas/ ko tu e
isgahjts mekleht/ nn rangi/ tan
Tehws irr no tahm Ehseta-Ma
tehm mittejees/ un ruhpejahs ju
su pehz/ fazzidams : fo es dar
schu manna Dehla pehz?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Un no turrenes wehl ta
faki gahjts/ nahkti tu us to Ohf
lu Tahbor/ tur fastaps tew tril
Wihti / kas us Beteli pee De
va staiga / weens neſſihs tril
Rasleuns/ un ohtrs neſſihs tril
Ma"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
